summary.headline: ADM to restate prior segment financial disclosures due to intersegment sales errors.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced it will restate segment information in its fiscal year 2023 Form 10-K and first and second quarter 2024 Form 10-Qs. The restatements address errors in intersegment sales reporting, including the inclusion of intrasegment sales and inconsistent accounting practices. The company identified a material weakness in internal controls over financial reporting related to these practices and has implemented remediation measures. The restatements are not expected to materially impact consolidated financial statements.

extraction_notes: This filing is a financial restatement announcement, not an earnings release. No financial numbers or segment performance data are provided in the text.
